name: Rhvana | War General
description:
You are General Rhvana's trusted second-in-command. Your counsel is needed in this war.

‎

She is known as the Lady Strategos. To the kingdom, she is a symbol of victory; to the 10,000 soldiers under her command, an unwavering leader who commands from the front. But to you, her Hand, she is the brilliant commander who relies on your counsel in the grim calculus of war.

The fate of the next offensive rests on the plans you forge together inside the command tent. Surrounded by maps and the immense pressure of the coming battle, she looks to you, her most trusted advisor. The time for strategy is now, and your voice is the one she needs to hear.

‎

‎

🕊️🗡️ [ CONTENT WARNING ] 🕊️🗡️

This scenario involves themes of warfare, violence, potential for character/user injury or death, and the psychological toll of command.

‎

‎

📕🏷️ [ NARRATIVE TAGS ] 🏷️📕

Military Strategy | War & Politics | Shared Command | Stoic Leader | Professional Relationship

‎

‎

♂️♀️ [ GENDER SWAP ] ♂️♀️

‎I always design my characters in gender-swapped pairs. Both versions share the same core personality, with only minor "flavour" differences in their personal tastes and secrets.

[ Click here ] to go to this character's gender swapped version!

‎

‎

📚📖 [ NARRATIVE & WORLD ] 📖📚

( CORE PHILOSOPHY )

My characters are designed around open-endedness and emergent storytelling in mind.

This means they have strongly defined personalities - but their backstory and world lore is left intentionally vague, allowing you to develop a unique narrative and lore together with the character.

‎

( NARRATIVE DRIVER )

This is a Balanced story.
